# protocol

```go
import "github.com/bingosuite/bingo/pkg/protocol"
```

Package protocol defines the JSON envelopes and payload types exchanged between the bingo server and its clients over WebSocket.

```go

```

DecodeEventPayload unmarshals e.Payload into dst \(a pointer to the payload type matching e.Kind\).

<a name="AttachPayload"></a>
## type AttachPayload

AttachPayload asks the debugger to attach to PID. BinaryPath is optional but required for breakpoints, locals, and stack frames \(DWARF source\).

```go
type AttachPayload struct {
    PID        int    `json:"pid"`
    BinaryPath string `json:"binaryPath,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="Breakpoint"></a>
## type Breakpoint

Breakpoint is a resolved breakpoint as reported by the debugger.

```go
type Breakpoint struct {
    ID       int      `json:"id"`
    Location Location `json:"location"`
    Enabled  bool     `json:"enabled"`
}
```

```go
}
```

```go
type BreakpointHitPayload struct {
    Breakpoint Breakpoint `json:"breakpoint"`
    Goroutine  Goroutine  `json:"goroutine"`
    Frames     []Frame    `json:"frames"`
}
```

<a name="Command"></a>
## type Command

Command is the envelope for all client\-to\-server messages.

```go
type Command struct {
    Version string          `json:"v"`
    Kind    CommandKind     `json:"kind"`
    Payload json.RawMessage `json:"payload"`
}
```

<a name="UnmarshalCommand"></a>
### func UnmarshalCommand

```go
func UnmarshalCommand(data []byte) (Command, error)
```

UnmarshalCommand parses raw WebSocket bytes into a Command envelope.

<a name="CommandKind"></a>
## type CommandKind



```go
type CommandKind string
```

<a name="CmdNone"></a>

```go
const (
    // CmdNone is the zero value, used for errors with no originating command.
    CmdNone CommandKind = ""

    CmdLaunch CommandKind = "Launch"
    CmdAttach CommandKind = "Attach"
    CmdKill   CommandKind = "Kill"

    CmdSetBreakpoint   CommandKind = "SetBreakpoint"
    CmdClearBreakpoint CommandKind = "ClearBreakpoint"

    CmdContinue CommandKind = "Continue"
    CmdStepOver CommandKind = "StepOver"
    CmdStepInto CommandKind = "StepInto"
    CmdStepOut  CommandKind = "StepOut"

    // CmdPause asynchronously interrupts a running tracee, forcing it to
    // suspend (reported via EventPaused). Unlike the resuming commands it is
    // issued while the process is RUNNING, so it is not a member of the hub's
    // resuming-commands set — see AGENTS.md → Pause.
    CmdPause CommandKind = "Pause"

    CmdLocals     CommandKind = "Locals"
    CmdFrames     CommandKind = "Frames"
    CmdGoroutines CommandKind = "Goroutines"

    // CmdRestart kills the current process (if any) and relaunches the last
    // Launch'd binary, reinstalling previously-set breakpoints. Only
    // supported for managed sessions started via Launch — see AGENTS.md →
    // Restart.
    CmdRestart CommandKind = "Restart"
)
```

```go
type ContinuedPayload struct{}
```

<a name="DiscardedBreakpoint"></a>
## type DiscardedBreakpoint

DiscardedBreakpoint reports a previously\-set breakpoint that could not be reinstalled after a Restart \(e.g. the file:line no longer resolves\).

```go
type DiscardedBreakpoint struct {
    Location Location `json:"location"`
    Reason   string   `json:"reason"`
}
```

<a name="ErrorPayload"></a>
## type ErrorPayload

ErrorPayload reports a failed command. Command uses omitempty so CmdNone \(the empty\-string sentinel\) is dropped from the wire.

```go
type ErrorPayload struct {
    Command CommandKind `json:"command,omitempty"`
    Message string      `json:"message"`
}
```

<a name="Event"></a>
## type Event

Event is the envelope for all server\-to\-client messages.

```go
type Event struct {
    Version string          `json:"v"`
    Kind    EventKind       `json:"kind"`
    Seq     uint64          `json:"seq"`
    Payload json.RawMessage `json:"payload"`
}
```

```go
func MustEvent(kind EventKind, seq uint64, payload any) Event
```

MustEvent is like NewEvent but panics on error. Tests only.


```go
func UnmarshalEvent(data []byte) (Event, error)
```

UnmarshalEvent parses raw WebSocket bytes into an Event envelope.

<a name="EventKind"></a>
## type EventKind



```go
type EventKind string
```

<a name="EventBreakpointHit"></a>Suspending events: the hub blocks after broadcasting these until a resuming command \(Continue / Step\*\) arrives. See AGENTS.md → suspend/resume protocol.

```go
const (
    EventBreakpointHit EventKind = "BreakpointHit"
    EventPanic         EventKind = "Panic"
    EventStepped       EventKind = "Stepped"

    // EventPaused reports that a Pause request forcibly halted the running
    // tracee. Like BreakpointHit it is a suspending event — the process is
    // stopped and the hub waits for a resuming command — but it is delivered
    // asynchronously in response to CmdPause rather than a self-stop.
    EventPaused EventKind = "Paused"
)
```

<a name="EventOutput"></a>

```go
const (
    EventOutput        EventKind = "Output"
    EventProcessExited EventKind = "ProcessExited"

    EventBreakpointSet     EventKind = "BreakpointSet"
    EventBreakpointCleared EventKind = "BreakpointCleared"
    EventContinued         EventKind = "Continued"

    EventLocals     EventKind = "Locals"
    EventFrames     EventKind = "Frames"
    EventGoroutines EventKind = "Goroutines"

    EventSessionState EventKind = "SessionState"

    EventError EventKind = "Error"

    // EventRestarted confirms a completed Restart: the process was
    // relaunched and previously-set breakpoints were reinstalled where
    // possible. It is a confirmation, not a suspending event — the process's
    // own suspend state is reported separately via the Stepped event emitted
    // at the new process's entry point (same as after Launch).
    EventRestarted EventKind = "Restarted"
)
```

<a name="Frame"></a>
## type Frame

Frame is a single entry in the call stack.

```go
type Frame struct {
    Index    int        `json:"index"`
    Location Location   `json:"location"`
    Locals   []Variable `json:"locals,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="FramesPayload"></a>
## type FramesPayload



```go
type FramesPayload struct {
    Frames []Frame `json:"frames"`
}
```

<a name="Goroutine"></a>
## type Goroutine

Goroutine is a snapshot of a running goroutine.

```go
type Goroutine struct {
    ID         int      `json:"id"`
    Status     string   `json:"status"` // "running" | "waiting" | "syscall" | "dead"
    CurrentLoc Location `json:"currentLoc"`
    GoLoc      Location `json:"goLoc"` // where the goroutine was spawned
    WaitReason string   `json:"waitReason,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="GoroutinesPayload"></a>
## type GoroutinesPayload



```go
type GoroutinesPayload struct {
    Goroutines []Goroutine `json:"goroutines"`
}
```

<a name="LaunchPayload"></a>
## type LaunchPayload



```go
type LaunchPayload struct {
    Program string   `json:"program"`
    Args    []string `json:"args,omitempty"`
    Env     []string `json:"env,omitempty"` // additional KEY=VALUE entries
}
```

<a name="LocalsPayload"></a>
## type LocalsPayload



```go
type LocalsPayload struct {
    FrameIndex int        `json:"frameIndex"`
    Variables  []Variable `json:"variables"`
}
```

<a name="LocalsPayloadCmd"></a>
## type LocalsPayloadCmd

LocalsPayloadCmd asks for locals in a stack frame. FrameIndex 0 is innermost.

```go
type LocalsPayloadCmd struct {
    FrameIndex int `json:"frameIndex"`
}
```

<a name="Location"></a>
## type Location

Location is a source position.

```go
type Location struct {
    File     string `json:"file"`
    Line     int    `json:"line"`
    Function string `json:"function,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="OutputPayload"></a>
## type OutputPayload



```go
type OutputPayload struct {
    Stream  string `json:"stream"` // "stdout" | "stderr"
    Content string `json:"content"`
}
```

<a name="PanicPayload"></a>
## type PanicPayload



```go
type PanicPayload struct {
    Message   string    `json:"message"`
    Goroutine Goroutine `json:"goroutine"`
    Frames    []Frame   `json:"frames"`
}
```

<a name="PausedPayload"></a>
## type PausedPayload

PausedPayload reports where the tracee was halted by a Pause request. It mirrors SteppedPayload: the location is wherever execution happened to be interrupted \(an async stop\), not a source\-line boundary.

```go
type PausedPayload struct {
    Goroutine Goroutine `json:"goroutine"`
    Location  Location  `json:"location"`
    Frames    []Frame   `json:"frames"`
}
```

<a name="ProcessExitedPayload"></a>
## type ProcessExitedPayload



```go
type ProcessExitedPayload struct {
    ExitCode int    `json:"exitCode"`
    Reason   string `json:"reason,omitempty"` // "killed" | "exited"
}
```

<a name="RestartPayload"></a>
## type RestartPayload

RestartPayload optionally overrides the args/env used for the relaunch. Leave a field nil to reuse the value from the original Launch; pass a non\-nil slice \(including an empty one\) to override it — an empty slice clears the args/env entirely.

The fields deliberately omit \`omitempty\`: encoding/json treats a nil slice and a non\-nil empty slice identically under omitempty \(both are dropped\), which would make an explicit "clear to empty" override indistinguishable from "reuse" on the wire. The hub gates the override on nil\-ness \(internal/hub handleRestart: \`if override.Args \!= nil\`\), so that distinction must survive the round trip. See issue \#102.

```go
type RestartPayload struct {
    Args []string `json:"args"`
    Env  []string `json:"env"`
}
```

<a name="RestartedPayload"></a>
## type RestartedPayload

RestartedPayload confirms a completed Restart.

```go
type RestartedPayload struct {
    Program     string                `json:"program"`
    Breakpoints []Breakpoint          `json:"breakpoints,omitempty"`
    Discarded   []DiscardedBreakpoint `json:"discarded,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="SessionState"></a>
## type SessionState

SessionState represents the lifecycle phase of a debug session. See AGENTS.md → session state machine.

```go
type SessionState string
```

<a name="StateIdle"></a>

```go
const (
    StateIdle      SessionState = "idle"
    StateRunning   SessionState = "running"
    StateSuspended SessionState = "suspended"
    StateExited    SessionState = "exited"
)
```

<a name="SessionStatePayload"></a>
## type SessionStatePayload



```go
type SessionStatePayload struct {
    SessionID string       `json:"sessionID"`
    State     SessionState `json:"state"`
    Clients   int          `json:"clients"`
}
```

## type SetBreakpointPayload



```go
type SetBreakpointPayload struct {
    File string `json:"file"`
    Line int    `json:"line"`
}
```

<a name="SteppedPayload"></a>
## type SteppedPayload



```go
type SteppedPayload struct {
    Goroutine Goroutine `json:"goroutine"`
    Location  Location  `json:"location"`
    Frames    []Frame   `json:"frames"`
}
```

<a name="Variable"></a>
## type Variable

Variable is a local variable or function argument.

```go
type Variable struct {
    Name    string `json:"name"`
    Value   string `json:"value"`
    Type    string `json:"type"`
    Address uint64 `json:"address,omitempty"`
}
```
